name: Funnel Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first five ingredients.
2. Mix egg and milk; add to flour mixture. Stir until batter is smooth.
3. Pour oil into a deep skillet, filling it no more than 1/3 full. Heat over medium heat to 375°F.
4. Holding your forefinger at the end of the funnel, pour about 1/4 cup batter into the funnel.
5. Place the funnel over the hot oil and remove your finger to let the batter flow.
6. As the batter flows, move the funnel in circles to form a spiral cake.
7. Fry for 2 minutes or until golden brown, turning once.
8. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
9. Repeat. Makes enough for 6 funnel cakes.
